---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Package

Which package does this relate to? (e.g., `@oidfed/core`, `@oidfed/explorer`)

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Spec Reference

If this relates to the OpenID Federation specification, reference the relevant section (e.g., section 10.2).
